name: Button
description: Highly customizable button with five visual variants (Filled/Outlined/Text/Elevated/Tonal), leading/trailing icons, loading state with spinner, link mode via Href, press-morph animation, and color support via FlareColor.

parameters.name: LeadingIcon
parameters.description: Icon rendered before the button label.

parameters.name: TrailingIcon
parameters.description: Icon rendered after the button label.

parameters.name: Variant
parameters.description: Visual style variant: Filled, Outlined, Text, Elevated, Tonal.

parameters.name: Size
parameters.description: Size: Xs, Sm, Md, Lg, Xl.

parameters.name: Shape
parameters.description: Corner shape: Default (theme native), Rounded, Circular, Square.

parameters.name: Typo
parameters.description: Overrides label typography. Null keeps size default.

parameters.name: Color
parameters.description: Button color. Semantic preset or Custom("#FF0000").

parameters.name: OnColor
parameters.description: Optional foreground color for filled variant when Color is custom.

parameters.name: Type
parameters.description: HTML button type: Button, Submit, Reset.

parameters.name: Loading
parameters.description: Shows a spinner and disables the button when true.

parameters.name: LoadingText
parameters.description: Replaces button label text while Loading is true.

parameters.name: PressMorph
parameters.description: Opt-in: corner radius animates while pressed.

parameters.name: FullWidth
parameters.description: Stretches button to full container width.

parameters.name: Href
parameters.description: When set, renders as a link <a> to this URL.

parameters.name: Target
parameters.description: Target for link button (e.g. _blank). Only with Href.

parameters.name: AriaPressed
parameters.description: Indicates pressed state for toggle buttons.

events.name: OnClick
events.description: Callback invoked when the button is clicked.
